function_v0.doc:
Swap `amount_in` of `from_asset` for `to_asset` via Soroswap router.

Output tokens go directly to `vault`.
Uses same-ledger approval.
function_v0.name: swap

function_v0.doc: Return the total base-asset value of all LP positions.
function_v0.name: get_value

function_v0.doc:
Initialize the strategy for a vault.

No pair-specific arguments \xe2\x80\x94 pairs are registered dynamically on first
`add_liquidity` call.

# Auth
The vault's current on-chain manager must authorise this call.
function_v0.name: initialize

function_v0.doc: Return `true` if any active position involves `asset`.
function_v0.name: asset_in_use

function_v0.doc:
Add liquidity to the Soroswap pair identified by `lp_token`.

On first call for a given `lp_token`, `pair.token0()` is called once to
cache the reserve-to-asset mapping; subsequent calls use the cache.

Returns `(amount_a_used, amount_b_used, lp_received)`.
function_v0.name: add_liquidity

function_v0.doc: Return the LP balance for a specific pair (`lp_token`).
function_v0.name: get_lp_balance

function_v0.doc: Return total base-asset value of all positions for `vault`.
function_v0.name: get_total_value

function_v0.doc:
Remove `lp_amount` from the pair identified by `lp_token`.

Underlying tokens go directly to `vault`.
Uses same-ledger approval (no zero-revoke).

Returns `(amount_a, amount_b)` received from the router so the vault can
compute post-operation value without a redundant deep LP revaluation.
function_v0.name: remove_liquidity

function_v0.doc: Return the number of active LP positions (> 0 means strategy holds LP).\n\nUsed by the vault's strategy-removal guard.
function_v0.name: get_share_balance

function_v0.doc: Proportionally withdraw `numerator/denominator` of every active LP\nposition and send underlying tokens directly to `to`.
function_v0.name: withdraw_fraction

function_v0.doc: Return all LP token addresses with an active (non-zero) position.
function_v0.name: get_active_positions

function_v0.doc: Refresh the cached AssetHandler address from the vault's factory.\n\nCall this after the factory's AssetHandler is updated post-deployment.
function_v0.name: refresh_asset_handler

function_v0.doc:
Return underlying token balances across all active LP positions.

For each active pair the strategy holds: computes
`amount_asset = lp_balance * reserve_asset / total_lp`
and sums across all positions per asset.

The vault uses this to price all assets in a single batch call
instead of triggering a full `get_total_value` (which nests factory +
AssetHandler + oracle calls inside the strategy).
function_v0.name: get_underlying_asset_balances

udt_error_enum_v0.doc: All errors that the SoroswapLpStrategy contract can raise.
udt_error_enum_v0.name: SoroswapLpError

cases.doc: `initialize` was already called on this contract instance.
cases.name: AlreadyInitialized

cases.doc: An entry-point that requires prior initialization was called before\n`initialize`.
cases.name: NotInitialized

cases.doc: The caller of `deposit_liquidity` or `withdraw` is not the registered\nvault address.
cases.name: NotVault

cases.doc: The caller of `pause`, `unpause`, or `set_oracle` is not the registered\nmanager address.
cases.name: NotManager

cases.doc: The strategy is currently paused; `deposit_liquidity` and `withdraw`\nare blocked.
cases.name: Paused

cases.doc: A zero or negative amount was supplied where a strictly-positive value\nis required.
cases.name: InvalidAmount

cases.doc: The requested LP withdrawal amount exceeds the strategy's tracked LP\ntoken balance.
cases.name: InsufficientLpBalance

cases.doc: An oracle returned a non-positive price, which would corrupt NAV math.
cases.name: InvalidOraclePrice

void_v0.doc: Factory (cached from vault at init to avoid re-entry).
void_v0.name: Factory

void_v0.doc: AssetHandler (lazy-cached from factory on first valuation).
void_v0.name: AssetHandler

void_v0.doc: Persistent init guard (survives instance TTL expiry).
void_v0.name: Initialized

tuple_v0.doc: Per-pair LP position, keyed by LP token address.
tuple_v0.name: Position

void_v0.doc: Ordered list of LP token addresses that have lp_balance > 0.
void_v0.name: ActivePositions

udt_struct_v0.doc: State for one Soroswap LP position (one pair).
udt_struct_v0.name: LpPosition

fields.doc: First token of the pair as passed at first add_liquidity.
fields.name: asset_a

fields.doc: Second token of the pair as passed at first add_liquidity.
fields.name: asset_b

fields.doc: Cumulative LP tokens held by this strategy for this pair.
fields.name: lp_balance

fields.doc: `true` when the pair's internal token0 == asset_a.\nCached at first deposit so `pair.token0()` is called only once per pair.
fields.name: token0_is_asset_a
